title: Tourists BEWARE...Stay away!! - Review of Victor Steinbrueck Park, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: **#424** of 921 things to do in Seattle. We were told that this park would be a nice place to bring our take out lunch from Pike Market by our tour guide. So after our tour we grabbed lunch from Beecher's Handmade Cheese and headed over there. While the views are spectacular we quickly lost our appetite with the STRONG stench of rotting urine and feces! VERY sad that they haven't cleaned this spot up so visitors and locals alike could enjoy the beautiful views! Date of experience: May 2016. *   Image 5 2 ### Mt. Rainier Day Tour from Seattle 4.9 (756) from $188. *   Image 6 3 ### Chef Guided Food Tour of Pike Place Market 4.9 (1,878) from $75. I was carrying a back pack, my food in a container, and a small cup of coffee. It was very crowded at lunchtime but it was a beautiful place to sit and enjoy some sunshine and views of the sound.
